header.subtitle: Transform your photos into futuristic masterpieces with the power of AI.

footer.poweredBy: Powered by Google Gemini. All images are generated by AI.

step1.title: Step 1: Upload Your Portrait
step1.subtitle: Select or drag & drop a personal photo to begin the transformation.

dropzone.title: Drag & Drop or Click to Upload
dropzone.subtitle: PNG, JPG, WEBP supported

error.title: Verification Error
error.notPersonal: This doesn't seem to be a personal photo. Please upload a picture of a person (e.g., a selfie or portrait).
error.failed: Verification failed. Please check your connection and try again.
error.invalidFile: Please upload a valid image file (PNG, JPG, etc.).

step2.title: Step 2: Add Cybernetic Enhancements
step2.subtitle: Drag & drop features you want to add to your photo.

step3.title: Step 3: Generation Complete
step3.subtitle: Your cyberpunk transformation is ready. Re-generate for a new look or download your creation.
step3.error: Image generation failed. Please try again.

modal.title: Join Our Community
modal.text: Enjoying the results? Consider donating to support development. Donors get access to our exclusive group chat!
modal.scan: Scan the code with your camera app.

feat6.name: Data Jack Port
feat6.description: A subtle port on the neck or temple.

feat7.name: Glowing Visor
feat7.description: A transparent, glowing visor over the eyes.
